zh.lifeSummary: 當Mouns Jonasson於1663年1月出生在美國賓夕法尼亞州費拉德爾福亞金辛時，他的父親Jonas Nilsson43歲，母親Gertrude Svensdotter Gunnarsson25歲。他於大約1682年與Ingeborg Lycon在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加宾夕法尼亚州結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和7個女兒的父母。他去世於1727年3月29日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加宾夕法尼亚州貝可斯阿米迪 堂史普道格拉斯維爾享年64歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加宾夕法尼亚州貝可斯阿米迪 堂史普道格拉斯維爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mouns Jonasson于1663年1月出生在美国宾夕法尼亚州費拉德爾福亞金辛时，他的父亲Jonas Nilsson43岁，母亲Gertrude Svensdotter Gunnarsson25岁。他于大约1682年与Ingeborg Lycon在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加宾夕法尼亚州结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和7个女儿的父母。他去世于1727年3月29日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加宾夕法尼亚州貝可斯阿米迪 堂史普道格拉斯維爾享年64岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加宾夕法尼亚州貝可斯阿米迪 堂史普道格拉斯維爾。

nameMeanings.name: Jonasson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Anders, Erik, Klas, Lars, Per.  German Ernst.
Swedish: patronymic from the Biblical personal name   Jonas  .
Americanized form of Norwegian, Danish, and North German   Jonassen  , a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Jonason
meanings: Americanized form of Swedish   Jonasson   or Norwegian, Danish, and North German   Jonassen  .

variants.name: Jonas
meanings: English, German, French, Dutch, Polish, Lithuanian, Sorbian, and Jewish (Ashkenazic); Czech (Jonáš); Slovak (mainly Jonáš, also Jónáš, Jónás); Hungarian (Jónás): from a personal name, which is a variant of the Biblical name Jonah, Hebrew Yonah, meaning ‘dove’ in Hebrew. In the book of the Bible which bears his name, Jonah was appointed by God to preach repentance to the city of Nineveh, but tried to flee instead to Tarshish. On the voyage to Tarshish, a great storm arose and Jonah was thrown overboard by his shipmates to appease God's wrath, swallowed by a great fish, and delivered by it on the shores of Nineveh. This story exercised a powerful hold on the popular imagination in medieval Europe, and the personal name was a relatively common choice. The Hebrew name and its reflexes in other languages (for example Yiddish Yoyne) have been popular Jewish personal names for generations. In North America, this surname is also an altered form of the Polish variant Jonasz. Compare Yonas .

nameMeanings.name: Mouns
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Koens
meanings: Dutch: patronymic from   Koen  . Compare   Koons  .

en.lifeSummary: When Mouns Jonasson was born in January 1663, in Kingsessing, Philadelphia, Pennsylvania, United States, his father, Jonas Nilsson, was 43 and his mother, Gertrude Svensdotter Gunnarsson, was 25. He married Ingeborg Lycon about 1682, in Pennsylvania, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 7 daughters. He died on 29 March 1727, in Douglassville, Amity Township, Berks, Pennsylvania, British Colonial America, at the age of 64, and was buried in Douglassville, Amity Township, Berks, Pennsylvania, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mouns Jonasson est né en janvier 1663, à Kingsessing, Philadelphie, Pennsylvanie, États-Unis, son père, Jonas Nilsson, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Gertrude Svensdotter Gunnarsson, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Ingeborg Lycon environ 1682, à Pennsylvanie, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 7 filles. Il est décédé le 29 mars 1727, à Douglassville, Amity Township, Berks, Pennsylvanie, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterré à Douglassville, Amity Township, Berks, Pennsylvanie, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mouns Jonasson im Januar 1663 in Kingsessing, Philadelphia, Pennsylvania, Vereinigte Staaten geboren wurde, war sein Vater Jonas Nilsson 43 und seine Mutter Gertrude Svensdotter Gunnarsson 25. Er hat um 1682 in Pennsylvania, British Colonial America Ingeborg Lycon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Er starb am 29. März 1727 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Douglassville, Amity Township, Berks, Pennsylvania, British Colonial America und wurde in Douglassville, Amity Township, Berks, Pennsylvania, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mouns Jonasson è nato il nel gennaio 1663 nel Kingsessing, Filadelfia, Pennsylvania, Stati Uniti d'America, il suo padre, Jonas Nilsson, aveva 43 anni e il suo madre, Gertrude Svensdotter Gunnarsson, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Ingeborg Lycon circa 1682, nel Pennsylvania, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 7 figlie. Morì il 29 marzo 1727, nel Douglassville, Amity Township, Berks, Pennsylvania, British Colonial America, all'età di 64 anni, e fu sepolto a Douglassville, Amity Township, Berks, Pennsylvania, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Mouns Jonassonが1663年1月にアメリカ合衆国ペンシルベニア州フィラデルフィアキングセシングで生まれた時，父Jonas Nilssonは43歳，母Gertrude Svensdotter Gunnarssonは25歳であった。約1682年にイギリス植民地アメリカペンシルベニア州でIngeborg Lyconと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼は1727年3月29日にイギリス植民地アメリカペンシルベニア州バークスアミトイ トウンシュイップドウグラスヴィルで64歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカペンシルベニア州バークスアミトイ トウンシュイップドウグラスヴィルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Mouns Jonasson(이)가 1663년 1월 미국 펜실베이니아 주 필라들필아 킨그세징에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Jonas Nilsson(은)는 43세였고, 그의 어머니 Gertrude Svensdotter Gunnarsson(은)는 25세였다. 그는 대략 1682년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 펜실베이니아 주에서 Ingeborg Lycon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1727년 3월 29일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 펜실베이니아 주 버크스 아미티 타운시프 더글래스빌에서 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 펜실베이니아 주 버크스 아미티 타운시프 더글래스빌에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mouns Jonasson nasceu em janeiro de 1663, em Kingsessing, Filadélfia, Pensilvânia, Estados Unidos da América, seu pai, Jonas Nilsson, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Gertrude Svensdotter Gunnarsson, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Ingeborg Lycon aproximadamente 1682, em Pennsylvania, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 7 filhas. Ele faleceu em 29 de março de 1727, em Douglassville, Amity Township, Berks, Pennsylvania, British Colonial America, com 64 anos, e foi sepultado em Douglassville, Amity Township, Berks, Pennsylvania, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mouns Jonasson родился январь 1663 г. в местности кингсессинг, филаделфя, Пенсильвания, Соединенные штаты, его отцу по имени Jonas Nilsson было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Gertrude Svensdotter Gunnarsson, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Ingeborg Lycon около 1682 г. в местности Пенсильвания, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 7 дочерей. Он умер 29 марта 1727 г. в местности доуглассвилл, амити тоуншип, биркс, Пенсильвания, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 64 лет и был похоронен в местности доуглассвилл, амити тоуншип, биркс, Пенсильвания, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mouns Jonasson nació en enero de 1663, en Kingsessing, Filadelfia, Pensilvania, Estados Unidos, su papá, Jonas Nilsson, tenía 43 años y su mamá, Gertrude Svensdotter Gunnarsson, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Ingeborg Lycon aproximadamente 1682, en Pensilvania, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió el 29 de marzo de 1727, en Douglassville, Amity Township, Berks, Pensilvania, British Colonial America, a la edad de 64 años, y fue sepultado en Douglassville, Amity Township, Berks, Pensilvania, British Colonial America.
